g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
permission check required: Write in FDT.mayPerform
rapid consecutive (>3 in 5min) or unusual amount (10x avg)
User lacks Write permission in mayPerform
Rapid Consecutive Withdrawals - Authentication Error Path
Both operations result in same post-state
Clear and actionable error messages required
400 Bad Request {message: "Amount must be positive number", suggestion: "Enter a value greater than 0.01"}
404 Not Found {message: "Account not found", suggestion: "Check account ID and try again"}
